title: Personal data minimization
requirement: Collect only fields needed for the approved business purpose. Email and IP address require explicit justification.

title: Deletion SLA
requirement: Vendors processing personal data must support deletion within 30 days unless Legal approves an exception.

title: Security assurance
requirement: SOC 2 Type II or equivalent independent assurance is required before production data transfer.

title: Regional data transfer
requirement: EU customer data may not be transferred to US-only vendors without DPA, SCCs, and business approval.
